hero.title: Meet Egg Cute
hero.desc: Egg Cute is a Japanese-style healing match game. Cute graphics and sound, gentle visuals — perfect for families, girls, and just people who would love to chill. A relaxing, low-pressure game like organizing a shelf or stickers. Swipe freely, play relaxed.
hero.imgAlt: Egg Cute game preview: level in progress and level complete

sectionWhy.title: What vibe does Egg Cute bring you?
sectionWhy.f1Desc: Gentle visuals and sound ease the mind like tidying a shelf—ideal when you want to unwind.
sectionWhy.f2Desc: Japanese healing-style art and 3-in-a-row matching suit kids, parents, and seniors alike.
sectionWhy.f3Desc: Match three of the same in each row to clear. Drag and drop, play anytime—no pressure.

gallery.title: Atmosphere We're crafting
gallery.c1Desc: Each level has cute characters and scenes, like reading a healing picture book that adds warmth to the game.
gallery.c2Desc: Soft colors and orderly grid bring a sense of balance and calm for a relaxing experience.
gallery.c3Desc: Intuitive drag-and-drop; match three to clear. Easy to pick up and play anytime.
